_meta.notes: Machine-translated starter draft. Native French speaker review required. French HR vocabulary is precise (bulletin de salaire vs fiche de paie; cotisation vs retenue); verify before production.

invite.expiresNote: Ce lien d'invitation expire dans 7 jours.
